channel.title: Tokyo Spin Vault — Authentic Beyblades from Japan
channel.description: Premium authentic Beyblades sourced direct from Japan. Free worldwide shipping. DDP — duties included.

item.g:title: Beyblade X UX-00 Aero Pegasus 3-70A RED Version — Japan Exclusive
item.g:description: Beyblade X UX-00 Aero Pegasus 3-70A RED VersionTakara Tomy BEYBLADE XUX-00 Aero Pegasus 3-70A Red Ver. beycode and blade rachet bit all included.Product Details Brand: TOMY Character: Blade Type: Action Figure Material: Metal Color: Red Model: 3-70A, 370A Year: 2024 Condition: New Authenticity: 100% Genuine Takara Tomy Shipping & Guarantee Free worldwide shipping via ePacket Light (7-14 business days) All duties & taxes included — DDP, no extra charges at delivery Express upgrade: DHL/FedEx (3-7 days) — free on orders $300+ or 3+ items Ships from: Tokyo, Japan Packaging: Double-boxed with bubble wrap for collector-grade protection All items are inspected and verified authentic before shipping. 100% genuine Takara Tomy products only.
